Products
Powerful machines for every application. Join the diversity of standard and individual equipment and find your solutions.
Services
Customer satisfaction is our main goal. A motivated and reliable team is always available to our customers. Extraordinary service performance.
Packaging Lines
We offer you all components needed for complete packaging lines as well as reliable project realization.
Events
Roadshows. Exhibitions. Fairs and friendly meets & greets in depend on weighing.
Welcome to Yamato Scale, the industry leader for multihead weighers, checkweighers and complete weighing and packaging solutions
Yamato Scale is an established manufacturer of multihead weighing systems for the Food and Non-Food industry. In addition to multihead weighers, computer combination weighers and checkweighers, Yamato is also specialized in offering reliable complete packaging solutions.
Whether your product is Confectionery, Snacks, Bakery, Cereals, Nuts, IQF, Fresh Produce, Meat, Fish, Mixed Products or Non-Food applications for Chemical and Pharmaceutical Products, Yamato has the latest technology to develop your individual weighing and packaging line solutions. Visit our Home Page and find the best solution for your weighing and packaging process.

Products
You are here:
Home
Products
OMEGA Series
Multihead weigher
Combines state-of-the-art technology with environmentally friendly features. The machines of the OMEGA Series belong to the high-end multihead scales. Their sophisticated design makes them applicable to the weighing and packaging process of all kinds of products. The fastest and most precise scale worldwide will convince you …
read more
EPSILON Series
Multihead weigher
The machines of the EPSILON Series are a worthy successor of the well-known SIGMA equipment. The multihead weighers of this series combine our enormous engineering experience with the latest technological developments. Our customers consider the EPSILON machines an insider tip since they offer remarkable performance at a sensational price …
read more
ALPHA Advance Series
Multihead weigher
Robust and powerful, these weighers offer the best price-performance ratio in the field of weighing machines. Providing reliable entry-level weighing solutions, the brilliant design of the  ALPHA Advance Series scales manages to cover all basic applications. The fast and precise machines deliver for 20-25 years on your packaging line …
read more
GFW
Bulk Weigher
The industrial bulk scale from Yamato is suitable for weighing and packaging bulk goods in large quantities. It is suitable for filling various bags and boxes. Use of the same machine for weights from 500g to 20kg …
read more
Semi-Automatic Weighers
The perfect weighing solution for „challenging“ products, which need to be packaged at fixed weights for the supermarket shelves. The machines in this series are unique to the market and fill the need for processing between manual and automatic packaging. We ensure you Return on Investment within the shortest time …
read more
I-Series
Checkweigher
Ensures the quality of your production. The Yamato I-Ser
